Interface IBuilderItem2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a builder item.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("607661EC-F105-4641-BE8B-4F1CB0D6F48C")]
public interface IBuilderItem2 : IBuilderItem
